ESOP Satisfaction Survey
Annual Employee Feedback Instrument
Company
{{companyName}}
Survey Year
{{surveyYear}}
Response Deadline
{{responseDeadline}}
Survey Administrator
{{administratorName}}
§ 01About This Survey

At {{companyName}}, you are an owner. This annual survey helps us understand how well we are communicating about your Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP) and how satisfied you are with this benefit.

Your responses are completely anonymous. No individual answers will be linked to you. The results are used solely to improve ESOP communications and plan administration.

How to respond: Please complete this survey by {{responseDeadline}} and return it to {{administratorName}} via {{responseMethod}}. It should take approximately 10–15 minutes.
—Rating Scale

For each question below, please circle the number that best reflects your response:

1 — Strongly Disagree
2 — Disagree
3 — Neutral
4 — Agree
5 — Strongly Agree
§ 02Understanding

How well do you understand your ESOP? Please rate each statement:

I understand what an ESOP is.
I understand how my ESOP account grows in value.
I understand the vesting schedule.
I know when and how I will receive distributions.
I understand my rights as an ESOP participant.
§ 03Satisfaction

How satisfied are you with the ESOP? Please rate each statement:

I am satisfied with the ESOP as a retirement benefit.
The ESOP makes me feel more connected to the company.
I believe the ESOP will provide meaningful retirement wealth.
I would recommend this company to others partly because of the ESOP.
§ 04Communication

How well are we communicating about the ESOP? Please rate each statement:

I receive enough information about the ESOP.
The information I receive is easy to understand.
I know who to contact with ESOP questions.
Annual statements are clear and helpful.
§ 05Open Feedback

We value your honest thoughts. Please write as much or as little as you like:

What do you value most about the ESOP?
What would you like to know more about?
How can we improve ESOP communications?
Any other comments?
§ 06Demographics (Optional)

These questions are optional and for analysis purposes only. Your responses will not be linked to your individual answers above.

§ 07Results Summary (Internal Use)
For administrator use only. Complete this section after compiling survey results.
Overall Satisfaction Score
{{overallSatisfactionScore}}
Understanding Score
{{understandingScore}}
Communication Score
{{communicationScore}}
Response Rate
{{responseRate}}

{{yearOverYearTrend}}
Priority Improvement Areas
{{priorityImprovementAreas}}
Key Findings
Recommended Actions
